response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled polyglot engineer with a long track record in backend systems, TypeScript, and staff-level responsibilities, and his current role does include MCP tooling and agentic infrastructure work. However, the role requires 8+ years of production AI development, and his AI exposure is effectively limited to a single role that began in April 2025 — roughly one month ago. There is no mention of Python anywhere in the resume, no RAG or vector database experience, and no LLM framework usage. The core technical requirements of this Staff GenAI role are not met.
strengths: Direct experience building Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role — a listed key technology
Long tenure of staff-level positions with demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing (workshops, Selenium course, recurring dojos)
Solid TypeScript and AWS CDK background with data-pipeline exposure from high-throughput micro-services work at Dunnhumby
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume — it is a primary language requirement and listed first in key technologies
Effectively zero AI/GenAI experience prior to April 2025; the 8+ year AI solution development requirement is unmet by a wide margin
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability frameworks anywhere in employment history or projects
